heroHeadline: Turkey: 727 Years from Ottoman Founding to Erdoğan's Presidential Republic
heroSubtitle: From Osman I's principality (1299) through the fall of Constantinople, Atatürk's revolution, PKK insurgency, and into the AKP era — now under Erdoğan's consolidated presidential system
footerNote: Data sourced from official reports, major outlets (Reuters, BBC, Al Jazeera, Hürriyet), institutional analyses (ICG, HRW, Freedom House), and authoritative historical scholarship.
